ModMetaData.name: VRE Highmate (HSK Bundle)
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Taranchuk, Sarg Bjornson — Bundling by CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
Standalone bundle of Vanilla Races Expanded — Highmate, packaged for the Hardcore SK modpack.
Pure social race — no combat, weapons, apparel, recipes, costLists, or items. The Highmate xenotype consists only of social/cosmetic genes (FelineEars, FelineTail, PerfectBody, HighmateHair, DominantGenome, Libido, LovinDependency), traits (Flirty, Distressed, Harmless, Lowmate), the InitiateLovin ability, and the LovinDependency hediff. Nothing needs HSK or CE patching.
Bundled here as part of the HSK-Race-Collection so users have a single drop-in replacement instead of needing the Steam Workshop version. Do NOT enable the Steam Workshop version of VRE Highmate alongside this — they would duplicate each other's defs.
Original mod by Oskar Potocki, Taranchuk, Sarg Bjornson. Bundling by CarbineAction.
Required: Vanilla Expanded Framework, Biotech DLC.
